title: Integer to String in Under 2 Nanoseconds #programming #cpp #performance
summary: Better Stack presents an optimization technique for converting integers to strings in C++ that achieves sub-2-nanosecond performance. The work focuses on low-level algorithmic efficiency for a fundamental computational operation.
